_schema.key: ENM-### from data/enemies.json — exact match, NOT enemy.name
_schema.cards: Array of EATK-### ids. Duplicates mean multiple copies in the shuffle.
_schema.greed: Optional override for CardStack enemy stack size (default 2)
_schema.pattern: random (default) | sequence — sequence plays cards in listed order, random shuffles each round

ENM-001._note: Cobweb Crawler: opens with Gnaw bleed, then Rend / Feral Swipe. ♠ cellar teacher — shows bleed early.

ENM-002._note: Shambling Corpse: steady 3-dmg Rend loop with an occasional Bone Brace. Slow but tanky.

ENM-003._note: Dungeon Rat: tiny, fast. Mostly Feral Swipes, rare Gnaw. 4 HP pest — never an existential threat.

ENM-004._note: Bone Guard: Rend → Brace → Crushing Slam. Telegraphs the heavy hit after bracing, rewards patient players.

ENM-005._note: Mold Wraith: ♣ DoT specialist. Spore Burst + Corrosive Spit. Forces the player to out-tempo poison.

ENM-006._note: Cave Toad: ♦ suit flavor, but uses ♣ poison (muddy mix — toads are weird). Light pressure.

ENM-007._note: Rot Hound: double bleed opener. Stacks bleed fast — players learn to bring cleanse or burst.

ENM-008._note: Bone Sovereign (boss): Crushing Slam, Bone Brace, Rend, Rupture. 4-card rotation, greed 3 — stacks harder.

ENM-010._note: Soot Imp: burn-heavy ♦. Ember Flare x2 + Rend. Teaches burn DoT in the foundry.

ENM-011._note: Iron Golem: Magma Carapace + Crushing Slam. Classic brace-then-slam read.

ENM-012._note: Slag Hound: ♦ burn + precision lance. Mid-tier foundry runner.

ENM-013._note: Clockwork Guard: ♣ stun bite + baseline rends. Stun forces player to burn their brace early.

ENM-014._note: Ember Sprite: 2 HP glass cannon. Spams Ember Flare — burn ticks longer than the fight does.

ENM-015._note: Scrap Brute: pure ♠ bruiser. Slam, Rend, Brace.

ENM-016._note: Smelt Master: ♦ DoT + heavy brace + lance. Mini-boss feel.

ENM-017._note: The Amalgam (foundry boss): full ♦ toolkit + crushing slam. Greed 3.

ENM-020._note: Tide Stalker: bleed + root. Sealab ambusher.

ENM-021._note: Shock Eel: double stun. Brutally annoying — forces player to stack outside their turn.

ENM-022._note: Lab Drone: clean ♣ pattern using ♦/♠ tricks (precision + brace).

ENM-023._note: Deep Crawler: heavy slam + bleed. High-tier ♠ sealab bruiser.

ENM-024._note: Brine Wraith: ♥ Blood Drain self-heal. Long attrition fight if you don’t burst it down.

ENM-025._note: Bio-Hazard Slime: poison + root. Pure CC/DoT — 8 HP fragile but infuriating.

ENM-026._note: Admiralty Enforcer: precise lance + brace + stun bite. Disciplined ♣.

ENM-027._note: Cryo-Brute: heavy slam + magma-tier brace. ♠ elite.

ENM-028._note: The Archivist (sealab boss): lance + stun + spores + heavy brace. Greed 3 — rotates through every ♣/♦ trick.

ENM-090._note: Hero’s Shadow: ♥ signature. Rupture + Blood Drain + Crushing Slam. Boss-tier ♥ encounter for the janitor hero-day hazard.
